_meta.keyKnowledge: We rehearse and perform music in various forms for audiences in both formal and informal settings.

_source.w: We rehearse and perform music in various forms for audiences in both formal and informal settings.
y: Performing live is the ultimate way to share our musical creativity and skills with others.
Rehearsal teaches us discipline, collaboration and attention to detail.
Engaging with an audience creates a unique musical experience that cannot be replicated.
eg: We ask 'How can I share my feelings with the audience?' when preparing to perform.
We rehearse and refine our performances to communicate ideas and meaning effectively.
We perform in ensembles, maintaining our part while listening to the whole group.
We present performances at school concerts, assemblies and community events.
We demonstrate appropriate performance etiquette and stage presence.
We reflect on our performances and set goals for ongoing improvement.
